pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 documentation and support forums showing standard Documents/NinjaTrader 8 folder structure contains Config.xml directly, not in a 'config' subdirectory. See: https://forum.ninjatrader.com/forum/ninjatrader-8/platform-technical-support-aa/104173-where-are-workspaces-templates-saved and https://crosstrade.io/blog/cannot-find-path-ninjatrader-default-location/

NinjaTrader support documentation explicitly states: 'Workspaces are stored on your PC at C:\Users\<yourusername>\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces'. See: https://forum.ninjatrader.com/forum/ninjatrader-8/platform-technical-support-aa/104173-where-are-workspaces-templates-saved

NinjaTrader support documentation confirms: 'A new installation of NinjaTrader 8 has the Slate Gray skin set by default.' Skin is accessed via Tools -> Options -> General -> Skin. See: https://support.ninjatrader.com/s/article/How-Can-I-Change-the-Color-Theme-in-NinjaTrader-Desktop?language=en_US

Windows timezone identifier for (UTC-05:00) Eastern Time. NinjaTrader allows setting timezone via Tools > Options > General > Time Zone to '(UTC-05:00) Eastern Time (US & Canada)'. The Windows system timezone identifier for this is 'Eastern Standard Time'. Verified via: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-hardware/manufacture/desktop/default-time-zones and https://forum.ninjatrader.com/forum/ninjatrader-8/platform-technical-support-aa/1212586-time-zone-setting

Task description mentions 'Enable Global simulation order fill processing'. NinjaTrader documentation confirms 'Global Simulation Mode' exists as a feature accessible via Tools > Global Simulation Mode, restricting all order entry to simulation accounts. However, the exact configuration field name/value format in Config.xml cannot be verified from available sources. See: https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/global_simulation_mode.htm

privileged_info_summary: NinjaTrader 8 is a legitimate trading platform. The task configures global platform settings. Verified facts: (1) Workspace directory is correctly specified at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces. (2) Slate Gray is the verified default skin in NinjaTrader 8. (3) Eastern Standard Time is the correct Windows timezone identifier for UTC-05:00 Eastern Time (US & Canada). (4) One metadata value is incorrect: the config_dir should be C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8 without the 'config' subdirectory, as Config.xml resides directly in the Documents/NinjaTrader 8 folder. (5) Global Simulation Mode is a verified NinjaTrader 8 feature, though the exact configuration field format remains unverifiable from public sources. Task data is synthetic (generated by environment setup scripts).
